hero.subtitle: Instantly identify plant diseases, get personalized treatment plans, and maximize your yield using cutting-edge artificial intelligence.

dashboard.title: Farm Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here is the current status of your primary crop.

analyze.title: AI Disease Scanner
analyze.subtitle: Upload a clear photo of the affected plant leaf for instant analysis.
analyze.supports: Supports JPG, PNG up to 10MB. Ensure the leaf is clearly visible.
analyze.alertFail: Failed to analyze image. Please try again.

steps.analyzing: Analyzing for fungal and bacterial patterns...

error.title: Failed to load report
error.desc: The report ID may be invalid or you do not have permission to view it.

status.healthyDesc: No significant diseases or pests were detected with high confidence.
status.diseaseDesc: We detected signs of infection. Immediate action is required to prevent further crop loss and spreading to healthy plants.

confidence.title: AI Confidence Analysis
confidence.none: No issues detected by the AI.

recovery.title: Recovery Estimate
recovery.label: Expected Recovery In
recovery.desc: If the recommended treatment is applied today, new healthy foliage should appear within a week.

medicine.warning: Wait at least 5 days after spraying before harvesting. Wear protective gear.

why.title: Why we recommend this
why.desc: Mancozeb is a broad-spectrum contact fungicide that provides excellent preventative action. It is highly recommended by ICAR for this specific stage of crop growth.

howItWorks.title: Three taps to happy plants
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting expert plant care has never been this easy (or this fun).

step1.title: Snap a photo
step1.desc: Point your camera at any plant — whether it looks healthy, sad, or somewhere in between. Our AI loves a good plant selfie!

step2.title: Get AI diagnosis
step2.desc: In seconds, our AI analyzes your photo and identifies diseases, deficiencies, or pests. It's like having a plant doctor on speed dial.

step3.title: Follow your care plan
step3.desc: Receive a personalized treatment plan with step-by-step instructions. Set reminders so you never forget to water again!

features.title: Everything you need for healthy crops

f1.title: AI Disease Detection
f1.desc: Instantly scan leaves to identify diseases with high accuracy using deep learning.

f2.title: Pest Detection
f2.desc: Identify harmful insects and pests automatically before they destroy your yield.

f3.title: Verified Medicine
f3.desc: Receive ICAR-verified chemical and organic treatment recommendations.

f4.title: Smart Irrigation
f4.desc: Optimize water usage with AI-driven watering schedules based on soil and weather.

f5.title: Weather Intelligence
f5.desc: Proactive hyper-local weather alerts for fungal risks and optimal spraying times.

f6.title: Crop History
f6.desc: Beautiful charts documenting the journey from disease detection to recovery.

posts.title: Understanding Soil pH: The Hidden Key to Maximum Yield
posts.excerpt: Most farmers overlook soil pH, yet it controls nutrient availability more than any other factor. Here's a simple guide to testing and correcting it.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI Crop Doctor.

page.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using AI Crop Doctor.
page.ctaSubtitle: Our agronomy team is ready to assist you with any questions.

items.q: Is AI Crop Doctor free to use?
items.a: Yes! You can start completely free as a guest with 2 trial scans — no sign-up required. Creating a free account gives you unlimited scans. We plan to offer a premium tier with advanced features in the future.

items.q: Do I need to create an account?
items.a: No! You can use guest mode for 2 free trial scans without any account. For unlimited scans and to save your scan history, create a free account in under 30 seconds.

items.q: What kind of photo should I take?
items.a: Take a close-up photo of the affected leaf in natural daylight. Make sure the leaf fills the frame, the image is in focus, and avoid shadows. Avoid screenshots from the internet — the AI validates that it is a real crop photo.

items.q: Which crops and diseases can it detect?
items.a: Our AI is trained on 50+ crops including tomato, wheat, rice, cotton, maize, potato, and more. It can detect 100+ diseases, pest infestations, nutrient deficiencies, and water stress conditions.

items.q: How accurate is the AI diagnosis?
items.a: Our model achieves 94%+ accuracy on common crop diseases. Accuracy improves with clear, well-lit photos of affected leaves. For critical decisions, we always recommend confirming with a local agricultural expert.
The AI analysis requires an internet connection as processing happens in the cloud. However, you can view your past scan history offline.

items.q: Is my farm data private and secure?
items.a: Absolutely. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell your farm data to third parties. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time from Profile Settings.

items.q: Can I delete my account and data?
items.a: Yes. Go to Profile Settings → Danger Zone → Delete Account. This permanently removes your account, all scan history, AI reports and data. This action cannot be undone.

items.q: Can I use it in my local language?
items.a: Yes! AI Crop Doctor supports 10 Indian languages including Hindi, Marathi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Punjabi, and Malayalam. Switch the language anytime from the navbar or Profile Settings.

items.q: How do I get treatment recommendations?
items.a: After every scan, we provide a detailed report with identified diseases, severity level, and step-by-step treatment recommendations including organic and chemical options tailored to your crop.
The web app is fully mobile-responsive and works great in your mobile browser. A dedicated iOS and Android app is coming soon.
